reviews.comment:

There's nothing along the route. The photos must be from another ACA station, perhaps in Famatina. But as this pin indicates, there's nothing along the route, neither an ACA nor a YPF station.

reviews.comment:
A veces se demora porque es la única estación de servicio de la zona pero los chicos se esfuerzan por atenderte rápido,  se puede usar app de YPF y controlar libras de neumáticos sin ningún costo.

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes it takes a while because it's the only gas station in the area, but the guys try hard to serve you quickly. You can use the YPF app and check tire pressure for free.
